changelog: Fix: YouTube downloads working again (iOS client broken by Google — switched to new method)
New: TikTok login inside app (Help → Login to TikTok) — fixes profile 'No videos found'
New: WeTV login inside app (Help → Login to WeTV) — download premium episodes
New: Drama sites now bypass Cloudflare using built-in browser as last fallback
Fix: DramaBox premium episodes — cookie lookup now finds login on both old and new domain
Fix: Facebook profile scrape — regular videos no longer get wrong URL format
